title: Slime Rancher
description: A mod based on the game Slime Rancher
body:
This mod contains new types of slimes, they can be friendly or agressive, but they are Rancheable, if you feed them, you will get a plort of these slime, which you can sell and get Newbucks. They are Gordo Slimes, which you can feed and make explode to get a Slime Key.

To spawn slimes you need to catch a slime spawner (finded on the map) and place it

# Types of slimes:

- Pink Slime
- Grass Slime
- Blue Slime
- Pure Slime
- Purple Slime
